source.sourcePath: raw/sources/Project/01_BLUE/01_G1417CW/DMR/12. 설계변경 문서/260123_BLUE Project 8종 원가 절감 및 성능 개선을 위한 설계변경/첨부파일/기구 변경/AQP704_설계 및 개발관리 규정_BLUE PROJECT_2026.01.23.xlsx

document.title: AQP704_설계 및 개발관리 규정_BLUE PROJECT_2026.01.23
document.documentType: 설계 및 개발 계획서, 입력서, 출력서, 검토서, 검증보고서, 유효성확인, 이관서 및 Part List

sourceSummary.oneLine: BLUE PROJECT 8종 Retrofit Detector의 설계개발 산출물, 법적 요구사항, 적용 표준, 검증·유효성확인 및 양산이관 자료를 포함한다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DMR 설계변경 첨부자료로서 설계 및 개발 입력·출력·검토·검증·유효성확인·이관 및 도면 등록/배포 기록의 근거로 사용된다.
keyPoints: 대상 모델은 G1717CW외 7종으로 표기되며 Part List에는 G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP, G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP가 포함된다.
개발 일정에는 EMC/CB인증, MFDS 허가, PP 진행, 양산이관 단계가 포함된다.
법적 요구사항 및 표준에는 IEC 60601-1, IEC 60601-1-2, IEC 62133-2, IEC 62368, 무선인증 관련 표준 및 국내 의료기기 규정이 열거된다.
설계 및 개발 검증보고서와 유효성확인 문서에는 SAFETY, EMC, IP68, 진동/낙하, 면압, 배터리 및 충전기 시험 결과가 합격 또는 PASS로 기록되어 있다.
설계 및 개발 이관서에는 BOM, Manual, 라벨, 포장사양서, Firmware, 도면, 검사 기준서, 제품표준서, 기술문서 등의 이관 대상 부서가 표시되어 있다.

concepts.name: DMR
concepts.evidence: 1) DMR(설계도, 부품도, BOM, 공정도, 작업표준, 수입/공정/제품/설치 검사표준, 라벨, 사용자 메뉴얼, 설계 검증 보고서, 공정 밸리데이션 보고서, 소프트웨어 밸리데이션 보고서, 설계 밸리데이션 보고서)

evidence.claim: The source identifies the item as G1717CW and seven other models under BLUE PROJECT.
evidence.evidenceText:
품명,,,G1717CW외 7종,,,,,,,설계 및 개발 계획서
모델,,,BLUE PROJECT

evidence.claim: The design and development schedule includes product planning, ES stages, EMC/CB certification, MFDS approval, PP, and mass-production transfer.
The design input document for A-DHI-BLU was prepared for model G1717CW and seven other models on 3/4/24 by the development department.
The functional and performance inputs include CsI scintillator and DQE specifications.
The detector size input requires compliance with ISO-4090 dimensions.
The design input requires IP68 or higher dust and water protection.
The design input requires preview time within two seconds.
The design input requires AED operation at a minimum incident area of 5 x 5 cm² and minimum incident dose at or below 2.5 µGy.
evidence.evidenceText:
AED,,,,,,"1. 최소 입사 면적은 5 x 5cm² 을 만족
2. 최소 입사 선량은 최소 입사 면적에서 2.5µGy 이하

evidence.claim: The legal requirements and standards section lists IEC 60601-1:2020 CB for electrical/mechanical safety.
The legal requirements and standards section lists IEC 60601-1-2:2020 KOLAS for electromagnetic safety.
The battery certification requirement is IEC 62133-2:2021.
The adapter certification requirement is IEC 62368:2018.
Wireless certification requirements include KS 3124/3126, EN 301 489-1/-17, ETSI EN 300 328, and FCC SUB PART C.
evidence.evidenceText:
무선인증(Bluetooth),,,,,,"1. KS 3124 / 3126
2. EN 301 489-1/-17
3. ETSI EN 300 328
4. FCC SUB PART C"

evidence.claim: Risk-management legal requirements include Korean Medical Device Act, Enforcement Rule, GMP standard, approval/report/review regulation, and common electrical/mechanical safety standard.
evidence.evidenceText:
Legal requirements,,,,,,"1. 의료기기법 (법률 제20888호)
2. 의료기기법 시행규칙 (총리령 제2029호)
3. 의료기기 제조 및 품질관리기준 (제2025-22호)
4. 의료기기 허가∙신고∙심사 등에 관한 규정 (제2023-80호)
5. 의료기기의 전기∙기계적 안전에 관한 공통기준규격 (제2020-29호)"

evidence.claim: Risk-management standard requirements include EN ISO 14971[2019], IEC 60601-1[2019], and IEC 60601-1-2[2013].
Other design and development requirements include software, usability, and risk-management standards.
evidence.pageTarget: Software Usability and Risk Management Requirements

evidence.claim: The design output document A-DHO-BLU was prepared for G1717CW and seven other models on 6/30/24 by the development department.
The design output states that functional/performance, usability/safety, legal/standard, and risk-management input requirements are satisfied or reflected.
evidence.evidenceText: 기능.성능 요구사항 - MRT 사항 충족 ... 사용적합성 및 안전 요구사항 - MRT 사항 충족 ... 법적 요구 사항 및 표준 - 관련 규정 충족 ... 위험관리 출력물 - 관련 규정 충족

evidence.claim: The design verification report A-DHVR-BLU was prepared for G1717CW and seven other models on 4/28/25.
The design verification report records MTF and DQE results meeting stated criteria.
The design verification report records PASS results for detector/power supply/main cable and console software functions including DICOM transfer and output.
evidence.evidenceText:
Detector & Power Supply
& Main Cable ... PASS ... Console Software ... DICOM 적합성 (전송) ... PASS ... DICOM 적합성 (출력) ... PASS

evidence.claim: The design validation document A-DHV-BLU was prepared for G1717CW and seven other models on 4/28/25.
Design validation lists IEC 60601-1 safety testing by ACTS and IEC 60601-1-2 EMC testing by KES as passing.
evidence.evidenceText:
제품 SAFETY,,,,,,,"IEC 60601-1 테스트
(시험기관 : ACTS / ACTS-2024-SM-241)" ... 합 ... 제품 EMC,,,,,,,"IEC 60601-1-2 테스트
(시험기관 : KES / KES-EM244316)" ... 합

evidence.claim: Design validation lists IP68 testing and vibration/drop testing by 원텍 as passing.
evidence.evidenceText:
신뢰성 (IP),,,,,,,"IP68 테스트
(시험기관 : 원텍 / OT-252-RRD-035)
 (원텍 / OT-252-RRD-036)" ... 합 ... 신뢰성 (진동/낙하),,,,,,,"단품 및 포장 진동 / 낙하 테스트
(시험기관 : 원텍 / OT-252-RRD-034)" ... 합

evidence.claim: Battery validation includes CB IEC 62133-2, KC 62133-2, UL2054, and UNDOT tests as passing.
The design transfer document A-DHTD-BLU applies to G1717CW and seven other models.

Design transfer includes BOM, Manual, labels, packaging specification, MCU Firmware, drawings, assembly process diagram, inspection criteria, reliability report, release inspection criteria, approvals, product standard, and technical documents.
evidence.evidenceText: BOM ... Manual ... 라벨 ... 포장사양서 ... MCU Firmware ... 도면 ... 조립 공정도 ... 검사 기준서 ... 신뢰성 Report ... 출하검사 기준서 ... 승인원 ... 제품표준서 ... 기술문서

evidence.claim: The DMR transfer requirements include drawings, BOM, process flow, work standards, inspection standards, labels, user manual, design verification report, process validation report, software validation report, and design validation report.
evidence.evidenceText: 1) DMR(설계도, 부품도, BOM, 공정도, 작업표준, 수입/공정/제품/설치 검사표준, 라벨, 사용자 메뉴얼, 설계 검증 보고서, 공정 밸리데이션 보고서, 소프트웨어 밸리데이션 보고서, 설계 밸리데이션 보고서)

evidence.claim: The drawing registration log was prepared and approved on 2025.10.21.
AQP704 requires internally created drawings to be registered by the quality management team and recorded in drawing registration log 704-12.
evidence.evidenceText: 7.4.2 사내에서 작성된 모든 도면은 품질경영팀에서 등록하며, 도면등록 대장(704-12)에 기록한다.

evidence.claim: AQP704 requires approved drawings for trial and mass-production products to be distributed to relevant team personnel and recorded in drawing distribution log 704-13.
evidence.evidenceText: 7.7.1 개발담당팀에서는 시작품 및 양산품 제작 시 가승인 또는 최종 승인된 도면을 관련팀 담당자에게 배포해야 하고, 도면배포 대장(704-13)에 기록한다.

reviewFlags.reason: The source is a combined preprocessed spreadsheet text containing multiple forms and part lists; no single overall document approval block is clearly identifiable.
Authority signal indicates MFDS/domestic, and the text includes MFDS approval and Korean medical-device regulations, but no issuing authority for the spreadsheet itself is stated.
Revision metadata is fragmented across many AQP704 forms, with 704-9 appearing as both REV.00 and REV.01.
Document date is inferred from repeated 2026-1-23 approval/part-list dates and the source filename; individual contained forms have different dates from 2023 through 2026.
OCR/CSV extraction quality is uneven, with comma-heavy rows, broken Korean line wrapping, and some apparent typos such as 계발개획, Consol software, and BULE_BAT_CON_PBA.
ProductSignal is Unclassified even though the source text identifies Retrofit Detector models and accessories.
